LOGIN_PASSWORDRESETSENT: password reset instructions have been sent.
LOGIN_TOOMANYATTEMPTS: too many login attempts. please try again later.
FORGOTPASSWORD_INSTRUCTIONS: enter your email to receive a reset link
FORGOTPASSWORD_RESETLINKSENT: reset link has been sent to your email
FORGOTPASSWORD_ERROROCCURRED: an error occurred, please try again
VERIFYEMAIL_INSTRUCTIONS: a verification link has been sent to your email. please follow the link inside to continue.
VERIFYEMAIL_RESENDSUCCESS: verification email has been resent successfully!
VERIFYEMAIL_RESENDERROR: failed to resend verification email. please try again.
RESETPASSWORD_INSTRUCTIONS: enter your email and we will send you instructions to reset your password.
TWOSTEP_INSTRUCTION: we sent a verification code to your mobile. enter the code below.
USERSIDEBAR_CARRENTALOFFERDESCRIPTION: rent your car with special discounts.
USERSIDEBAR_TRAVELWITHFRIENDDESCRIPTION: have a unique experience with your friends.
TUTORIAL_STEP2: this section shows important account information.
SPECIALOFFER_DESCRIPTION: a stylish and beautiful home for rent.
ADSCAROUSEL_MODERNHOUSEDESCRIPTION1: a modern home with full amenities.
ADSCAROUSEL_MODERNHOUSEDESCRIPTION2: a quiet and beautiful place to stay.
TOPRATEDAD_DESCRIPTION: this home has received the highest ratings.
AD_MODAL1_1: what type of property do you have and whether guests are reserv the entire place or just a room?
AD_MODAL1_2: then let us know the location and the number of guests who can stay.
AD_WHENADDRESSSHOW: your address will only be shown when a host books it
step_two_description: here you add some amenities your place offers, plus 3 or more photos...
AD_NEED_TO_ADD_PHOTOS: you need to add at least 3 to 10 photos.
AD_YOU_CAN_ADD_REMOVE_PHOTOS_LATER: you can add or remove photos later.
AD_TELL_GUESTS_ABOUT_AMENITIES: tell guests what your place has to offer
AD_SHORT_TITLE_SUGGESTION: a short title is suggested. enjoy it, you can change it whenever you want.
AD_GIVE_TITLE_FOR_ACCOMMODATION: now, lets give a title for your accommodation
AD_MODAL_4_TITLE: here, lets give a description of your accommodation.
AD_MODAL_4_DESCRIPTION: choose up to two prominent options. we will use these options to start your explanation.
AD_SHARE_WHAT_MAKES_YOUR_PLACE_SPECIAL: share what makes your place special
AD_FINAL_STEP_DESCRIPTION: finally, you will choose to make reserv changes, price and publish your listing.
AD_HOWRESERVE: how would you like to reservation?
AD_RESERVATIONAUTOMATICALLY: the applicant can make a reservation automatically
AD_RESERVATIONREQUEST: the applicant must submit a reservation request
AD_HELPS_HIGHLIGHT_YOUR_NICHE: helps you highlight your niche. get the first host review and earn more.
AD_OFFFIRSTRESERVE: 20% discount offer for the first three reserve
AD_OFF7NIGHT: 10% for stays of 7 nights or more
AD_OFF28NIGHTSTAY: 20% for stays of 28 nights or more
AD_HOST_TYPE_QUESTION: what kind of host are you?
AD_HOST_AS_INDIVIDUAL: i am a host, as a person.
AD_HOST_AS_BUSINESS: i am a host, as a business.
AD_LOCATION_FEATURES: does your location have one or more of the following?
AD_CCTV_PROHIBITED: cctv cameras are prohibited inside the residence, even if they are turned off.
AD_ONSITE_CAMERAS_REQUIRED: all cctv cameras in the premises must be marked with a sign.
AD_FOLLOW_LOCAL_REGULATIONS: be sure to follow local laws and review injaonja's anti-discrimination policy and guest and host fees.
AD_SHOWHOST: here we show you what we will show the host.
AD_REQUIRED_SECTIONS: please go to the required sections below to complete the required items until your listing is approved.
AD_CHOOSE_AVAILABLE: choose which days your listing is available. it will be visible 24 hours after publishing.
AD_SET_HOUSE_RULES: set house rules, cancellation policies, how hosts can book, and more..
FEATURENOTAVAILABLE: this feature will be available soon
STEP1DESCRIPTION: tell us about your travel preferences
STEP1_1DESCRIPTION: in this step, we'll ask where you're traveling to, your travel style (adventure, luxury, backpacking, or camping). then we'll ask for information about your budget, travel habits, and travel experiences.
TRAVELSTYLESUBTITLE: your upcoming trip will be which of these options: city tour, luxury, adventure, backpacking, or camping.
BUDGETDESCRIPTION: approximately how much budget per person is needed for this trip
PLEASESELECTSTYLE: please select one of the travel styles
PERSONALITYHEADER: here we ask about your personality traits and travel habits.
PERSONALITYSUBHEADER: share personality traits and travel habits like being an early riser, night owl, planner, calm, easygoing, etc. with potential travel companions.
PHOTOUPLOADDESCRIPTION: in this section you can add up to 10 photos from your previous trips along with your favorite places that we'll show in the listing.
OPTIONALPHOTONOTE: you can skip this section without uploading photos and information, but we recommend using this section for better feedback on your listing. you can also add or remove photos later.
PHOTODESCRIPTIONPLACEHOLDER: description about these photos (location, date, and travel experience)
MAXPHOTOSWARNING: you can upload up to 10 photos maximum
SELECTTRAVELCOMPANION: specify your travel plan and companion
STEP2DESCRIPTION: in this step, you'll select your travel companion(s), specify your travel plan, and optionally share your travel checklist.
WRITEORUPLOADTRAVELPLAN: write or upload your travel plan
TRAVELPLANPLACEHOLDER: write your travel plan details here...
NOTIFYCHANGESWARNING: if there are any changes to the travel plan, you must notify your companion(s).
INVALIDFILETYPE: only pdf, jpg, png files are allowed
TRAVELCHECKLISTSUBTITLE: you can optionally upload or write the required checklist for this trip in the sections below.
TRAVELCHECKLISTPLACEHOLDER: write your travel gear checklist and plan here...
CHECKLISTCHANGENOTIFICATION: if there are any changes to the travel plan, you must notify your companion(s).
CURRENTCOMPANIONSINFO: in this section, how many people are accompanying you
CURRENTTRAVELERSINFO: gender and number of companions who currently want to accompany you
EXISTINGCOMPANIONSINFO: how many people are there without considering new people who will accompany you through the listing
SELECTCOMPANIONSTITLE: select the companion(s) who will join you through this listing
COMPANIONSSELECTIONSUBTITLE: specify the gender and number of your companions
COMPANIONSWILLJOIN: companions who will join you through this listing
SPECIFYGENDERANDCOUNT: please specify the gender and number of your companions
MOREDESCRIPTIONINSTRUCTION: you can write additional information and descriptions about your companion(s), travel dos and don'ts, and anything that helps make your listing more visible and clear in the box below.
ADDITIONALDESCRIPTIONPLACEHOLDER: a memorable and adventurous trip with me and ...
DESCRIPTIONCHANGENOTIFICATION: if changes are made to the description, previous companions will be notified.
FINALREVIEWDESCRIPTION: finally, you'll specify the travel dates, set pricing, review and publish your listing. you can also optionally set up an invitation and send it to those you want to accompany you on this trip.
TRAVELDATESUBTITLE: please specify your travel time frame
TRAVELDATEINSTRUCTION: you can select the desired range by dragging the mouse over the calendar or clicking on dates
TIP1DESCRIPTION: always share your travel information with a trusted person.
TIP2DESCRIPTION: talk to your companions about expectations and plans before the trip.
SECURECOMMUNICATIONDESCRIPTION: for your safety, always communicate through the app. never share personal contact information before completing the trip.
USEAPPONLYMESSAGE: please use only the app for all communications and transactions.
PAYMENTSDESCRIPTION: all payments must be made through the app. never pay in cash or outside the app.
SECURITYCAMERASRULE: • vehicles must be equipped with security cameras by law.
FOLLOWLOCALRULES: • always follow local traffic rules and regulations.
FINALREVIEWSUBTITLE: here we show you what we'll show to your companion
FINALREVIEWDESCRIPTION2: the information below is what others will see
NEXTSECTIONPREVIEW: you'll see in the next section!
IDENTITYVERIFICATIONNOTICE: we'll let you know if you need to verify or reject your identity documents with your local government.
SECURITY_PASSWORDMISMATCH: new password and confirmation do not match.
SECURITY_CONFIRMACCOUNTACTION: are you sure you want to {action} your account?
ACCESS_ZOOMHINT: use the buttons to zoom in or out.
ACCESS_PANHINT: move around the map using the direction buttons.
CURRENCY_MESSAGE: currently, only the euro (eur) is supported. more currencies will be added in the future.

NOTIFICATIONS_UNSUBSCRIBEDESC: you will still receive notifications about your account activity.
NOTIFICATIONS_REMINDERSDESC: receive important reminders about bookings, listings, and account activity.
NOTIFICATIONS_MESSAGESDESC: stay in touch with your hosts or guests before or during your stay.
NOTIFICATIONS_SMSCONSENT: by selecting text messages, you agree to receive automated marketing messages from injaonja at +39 *** *** 9045. to receive messages with another number, update your phone number settings in your personal information page.

PRIVACYSHARING_REQUESTDATA_DESCRIPTION: we will create a file for you to download your personal data.
DELETEACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION: this will permanently delete your account and data in accordance with applicable law.

PRIVACYSHARING_THIRDPARTYTOOLS_NESTEDDES: choose how injaonja shares your information with third parties.
PRIVACYSHARING_THIRDPARTYTOOLS_SHARINGLA: allow sharing information with third parties

PRIVACYSHARING_THIRDPARTYTOOLS_MARKETING: allow the use of marketing tools
PRIVACYSHARING_SHARING_DESCRIPTION: decide how your profile and activity are shown to others.
PRIVACYSHARING_SHARING_NESTEDDESCRIPTION: decide how your profile and activity are shown to others.
PRIVACYSHARING_SHARING_PUBLICLABEL: public (your profile and activity are visible to everyone)
PRIVACYSHARING_SHARING_PRIVATELABEL: private (only you and approved users can view)

GUIDE_CREATEGUIDEDESCRIPTION: create your guide book and help your guests have a good travel experience.
GUIDE_GUIDEDESCRIPTION: on this page, the host can create a travel guide and send it to their guests.

GUIDE_SUPPORT_WELCOMEMESSAGE: hello, how can i help you?
GUIDE_SUPPORT_CONTACTSUBTITLE: we'll start with a few questions and guide you in the right direction.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_CANCELGUEST: how do i cancel as a guest?
GUIDE_SUPPORT_CANCELGUESTANSWER: to cancel a reservation, go to your bookings section and select the cancel option.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_ACCOUNTSETTINGSANSWER: change your account settings from the profile section.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_REFUNDHOST: changes, cancellations, and refunds for hosts
GUIDE_SUPPORT_HOSTINGGOALSANSWER: use our guidance to achieve your hosting goals.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_PREPARELISTINGSANSWER: prepare your listings from the stays management section.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_PAYMENTSANSWER: payment information is available in your financial section.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_MANAGEEXPERIENCESANSWER: manage your experiences from the experiences section.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_COHOSTANSWER: co-hosting helps you improve your hosting experience.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_BILLHELPANSWER: for help with bills, contact financial support.
GUIDE_SUPPORT_CONTACTFALLBACK: to contact support, use the contact information on the website.
GUIDE_REPORT_DESCRIPTION: you can report noises, disturbances, parties, and complaints here.
GUIDE_REPORT_EMERGENCYMESSAGE: if you feel unsafe or encounter any illegal or dangerous activities, please contact the local police immediately.
GUIDE_REPORT_EMERGENCYSUBINFO: please contact support if any disturbance or noise is disrupting your peace.
GUIDE_REPORT_OTHERISSUESDESCRIPTION: sending a message and reporting issues on site helps our team conduct more accurate investigations.
GUIDE_REPORT_REPORTFALLBACK: to send a report, use the contact information on the website.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_DESCRIPTION: you are just 3 steps away from your next adventure
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_STEP1DESCRIPTION: start by exploring stays or experiences. apply filters for entire homes, cars, tours, or pets to narrow down your options. you can also save your favorites to a wishlist.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_STEP2DESCRIPTION: once you find what you're looking for, learn about your host, read reviews from past guests, and get details on cancellation options—then book with just a few clicks.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_STEP3DESCRIPTION: you're all set! communicate with your host through the app for guidance, questions, or advice. you can also connect with injaonja anytime for additional support.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_SUPPORTTITLE: anywhere, anytime, we're here to help
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_SUPPORTDESCRIPTION: hosts are committed to providing all health and safety measures for their guests. these are also shared through feedback lists.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ1QUESTION: do i need to meet my host?
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ1ANSWER: no, you do not need to meet your host. all communication is done through the app.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ2QUESTION: what do i need to do to cancel if i have a problem?
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ2ANSWER: you can cancel your booking through the reservations section in the app. cancellation terms depend on the host.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ3QUESTION: when is my payment processed for the booking?
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ3ANSWER: your payment is processed immediately after the booking is confirmed.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ4ANSWER: the hosting center includes guides and resources to help hosts provide a better experience for their guests.
GUIDE_HOWITWORKS_FAQ5ANSWER: for more information, you can use the support section in the app or visit our website.
